no: Automatically refreshes all abilities after a set time while out of combat. Eliminates need for resting to recover spells/abilities. Download extracts to wl_RestBeGone folder.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: RestBeGone AKA Rest Begone AKA Rest Be Gone automatically refreshes all abilities after a certain time while out of combat.

co.n: RestBeGone - Per Encounter Spells & Abilities -> Default - Toggle off (and on again) via console
